message.content:
I need to understand the patterns used in this Raycast clone project to build a new "Window Management" screen. Please:

1. Read src/registry/types.ts and src/registry/commands.ts to understand the command registration pattern
2. Read one existing self-contained view (e.g. src/components/file_search/file_search_view.tsx) to understand the view component pattern (SearchBar, List, ActionPanel, etc.)
3. Read src/data/file_search_data.tsx to understand the data file pattern
4. Read src/components/icons/index.ts to see available icons
5. Read src/components/list/list.tsx to understand the List component API
6. Read src/components/grid/grid.tsx and grid_item.tsx to understand Grid component API
7. Read src/types.ts for existing types

Return ALL the code content so I can understand the patterns fully.

content.text: I'll help you understand the patterns in this Raycast clone project. Let me start by reading the project structure and the specific files you mentioned.

1→import type { ReactNode } from 'react';
     2→
     3→export type FileType =
     4→  | 'folder'
     5→  | 'document'
     6→  | 'code'
     7→  | 'image'
     8→  | 'pdf'
     9→  | 'archive'
    10→  | 'spreadsheet'
    11→  | 'presentation';
    12→
    13→export interface FileEntry {
    14→  id: string;
    15→  name: string;
    16→  path: string;
    17→  fileType: FileType;
    18→  size: number;
    19→  modifiedAt: Date;
    20→}

   133→      />
   134→      <path
   135→        d="M9 11l-1.5 1.5a1.75 1.75 0 002.5 2.5L11.5 13.5"

   138→        strokeLinecap="round"
   139→        strokeLinejoin="round"
   140→        fill="none"
   141→      />
   142→    </svg>
   143→  );
   144→}
   145→
   146→const QUICKLINK_TYPE_LABELS: Record<QuicklinkType, string> = {

   148→  file: 'File Path',
   149→  deeplink: 'Deep Link',
